name: Box
description: Box cloud storage and content management. List folders, search files, upload content, create folders, and manage shared links.

credential_fields.name: accessToken
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Box developer token or OAuth access token

tools.name: list_folder_items
tools.description: List all files and folders within a specific Box folder. Returns item names, types, IDs, sizes, and modification dates. Supports pagination via offset and limit. Use folder_id '0' for the root folder.

folder_id.description: The ID of the folder to list items from. Use '0' for the root folder.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response (e.g. 'name,size,modified_at,type').

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return per page. Default is 100, max is 1000.

offset.description: The offset of the item at which to begin the response. Default is 0.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific file in Box by its ID. Returns metadata including name, size, SHA1 hash, owner, parent folder, timestamps, shared link status, and more.

file_id.description: The unique identifier of the file to retrieve information for.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include (e.g. 'name,size,sha1,shared_link,parent,modified_at,created_by').

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search for files, folders, and web links across Box content. Supports filtering by content type, file extensions, ancestor folders, date ranges, and more. Returns matching items with metadata.

query.description: The search query string to match against item names, descriptions, and file contents.

type.description: Limit results to a specific item type.

content_types.description: Comma-separated list of content types to search: 'name', 'description', 'file_content', 'comments', 'tags'.

ancestor_folder_ids.description: Comma-separated list of folder IDs to limit the search scope to.

file_extensions.description: Comma-separated list of file extensions to filter by (e.g. 'pdf,docx,txt').

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 30, max 200.

offset.description: The offset for pagination. Default is 0.

fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload a file to Box. The file content is sent as part of a multipart form upload to the Box upload endpoint. Provide the file name and the parent folder ID where the file should be stored. Note: for files over 50MB, use chunked upload instead.

attributes.description: JSON object with file metadata including 'name' (filename) and 'parent' object with 'id' (folder ID).

name.description: The name for the uploaded file.

id.description: The ID of the parent folder. Use '0' for root.

content_url.description: A publicly accessible URL to fetch the file content from for upload.

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder in Box. Specify the folder name and the parent folder ID where it should be created. Use parent ID '0' to create a folder in the root directory.

name.description: The name for the new folder.

parent.description: The parent folder to create the new folder in.

id.description: The ID of the parent folder. Use '0' for the root folder.

tools.name: create_shared_link
tools.description: Create or update a shared link for a file in Box. Allows setting the access level (open, company, or collaborators), optional password protection, expiration date, and download permissions. Returns the file object with the shared link URL.

file_id.description: The ID of the file to create a shared link for.

access.description: The access level for the shared link.

password.description: Optional password to protect the shared link.

unshared_at.description: Expiration date for the shared link in ISO 8601 format.

can_download.description: Whether the shared link allows downloads.

can_preview.description: Whether the shared link allows previewing.
